evals.prompt: I need to build a waiting list for Pikar-AI before launch. I want to use LinkedIn and Twitter. Budget is under $1K. It's just me executing.
evals.expected_output: Should run discovery (brief), then dispatch Growth Hacker, Content Marketer, and Social Media Manager agents. Deliverables: waiting list mechanics, landing page copy, LinkedIn posts, Twitter posts/threads, email capture sequence, referral system design.

evals.prompt: We're launching Pikar-AI next month. I need a full launch campaign — press, social, community, everything. Budget is $5K.
evals.expected_output: Should dispatch all 6 specialist agents. Deliverables: brand positioning, press release, media list, Product Hunt plan, social content calendar for multiple platforms, community setup plan, email sequences, ad campaigns, launch timeline.

evals.prompt: How do we get our first 100 users? I have a landing page but no email list, no social following. Zero budget for ads.
evals.expected_output: Should focus on organic-only tactics. Dispatch Growth Hacker (organic viral), Content Marketer (SEO, content), Social Media Manager (organic social), Community Builder. No paid ad deliverables. Should include: community strategy, content plan, social bootstrapping tactics, referral mechanics.
